name: Jamie Oliver Chicken Burgers
description: A fresh, healthy alternative to traditional beef burgers made with seasoned minced chicken, herbs and spices for a juicy, flavorful patty.
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
method: In a large mixing bowl, combine the minced chicken, breadcrumbs, beaten egg, minced garlic, chopped parsley, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well until everything is evenly combined.
Divide the mixture into four equal portions and shape each into a round patty, slightly larger than the burger bun (as they shrink while cooking).
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
Cook the chicken patties for about 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through. The internal temperature should reach 75°C (165°F).
Spread a layer of mayonnaise on the bottom half of each bun.
Place a lettuce leaf, followed by the cooked chicken patty.
Add tomato slices, red onion, and any additional condiments like mustard or ketchup.
Top with the other half of the bun.
Serve immediately with a side of fries, coleslaw, or a simple salad.
